ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, pp. 274-277 (British Library Shelfmark:610.m.10.) Portrait by Franciscus Cithè in Vincenzo Auria, Oratione, 1653
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
